measurements.label: Head width
measurements.notes: Estimated from front view using the reference sheet scale.

measurements.label: Head height
measurements.notes: Estimated from side view. Skull top approximated slightly below hair volume.

measurements.label: Head depth
measurements.notes: Distance between the most forward point of the forehead and the rear of the skull.

measurements.label: Pinna offset down
measurements.notes: Vertical distance from the geometric center of the head profile to the ear canal.

measurements.label: Pinna offset back
measurements.notes: Horizontal distance from the geometric center of the head profile to the ear canal.

measurements.label: Neck width
measurements.notes: Estimated at the widest point of the neck in the front view.

measurements.label: Neck height
measurements.notes: Vertical extent of the visible neck area from the side.

measurements.label: Neck depth
measurements.notes: Horizontal depth of the neck from the side profile.

measurements.label: Torso top width
measurements.notes: Width of the upper torso region.

measurements.label: Torso top height
measurements.notes: Vertical height of the upper torso segment.

measurements.label: Torso top depth
measurements.notes: Horizontal depth of the upper chest area.

measurements.label: Shoulder width
measurements.notes: Biacromial width estimated from the front view.

measurements.label: Head offset forward
measurements.notes: Distance from the head center to the most forward point of the forehead.

measurements.label: Seated height
measurements.notes: Estimated seated height based on typical proportions for a 6'0" male.

measurements.label: Head circumference
measurements.notes: Estimated based on head width and depth measurements.

measurements.label: Shoulder circumference
measurements.notes: Estimated based on shoulder width and torso depth.
